tasks.goal: Improve and verify the tour agent workflow through an autonomous QA loop before publishing.

tasks.task: Fix v29 Real QA false positive. The report must never use PASS_AND_PUBLISH when n8n output contains hidden execution errors. Treat these strings as hard failure: '--id has to be set!', 'FATAL', 'Error', 'Failed', 'Command failed', 'has to be set', 'Cannot', 'Exception'. If any of these strings are present in n8n output, decision must be FAIL_DO_NOT_PUBLISH. Also fix execution command: after import, execute workflow by real workflow id, not execute_file without id.
tasks.pass_criteria: New report must not contain '--id has to be set!'. If n8n output contains this string, decision must be FAIL_DO_NOT_PUBLISH. PASS_AND_PUBLISH is allowed only when n8n workflow is executed by id and output has no hidden errors.
